title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.411 - Change of residence deemed grounds for modification of custody, when
text:
452.411.  Change of residence deemed grounds for modification of custody, when. — If either parent of a child changes his residence to another state, such change of residence of the parent shall be deemed a change of circumstances under section 452.410, allowing the court to modify a prior visitation or custody decree.
(L. 1988 H.B. 1272, et al. § 10, A.L. 1998 S.B. 910) 
(2002) Section only applies when relocation occurs in violation of section 452.377.  Baxley v. Jarred, 91 S.W.3d 192 (Mo.App.W.D.).
